mean_en: a set of instructions in code that control the operations or functions of a computer; something that people watch on television or listen to on the radio; a plan of things that will be done or included in the development of something
sentence: They're working on a big program.
sentence_trans: 他们正在做一个大项目。
word_etyma: pro在前 + gram写，图 → 在前面写好 → program计划；提纲
